title.en: With that, the Weeping Blood Emperor prepared t...

content.en:
The Ancient Sea Ancestor was a two-step invincible Domain Ancestor, and the Weeping Blood Emperor didn't feel that he was his opponent.

Unless his body is here, he can compete with the Ancient Sea Ancestor, otherwise he can't beat the Ancient Sea Ancestor at all.

Moreover, whether the Ancient Sea Ancestor had been promoted to a one-step invincible Domain Ancestor now, he was not sure, after all, he had not seen the Ancient Sea Ancestor make a move for a long time.

"You can all appear here, why can't I appear here?"

Gu Hai Ancestor said with a smile, but he did not clearly answer the question of the Weeping Blood Emperor.

The Weeping Blood Emperor knew very well that he would not be able to save the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor today.

"Gu Hai Ancestor, I'm just here to join in the fun today, I'll leave now!"

With that, the Weeping Blood Emperor prepared to leave.

He didn't want his doppelganger to fall here, after all, this doppelganger was also part of the power of the body, and once it fell, it would take a long time to recover.

Although he also wanted the Thousand Blood Treasure Lotus, but now that he couldn't complete the task of the Qingfeng Holy Lord, he simply gave up, otherwise the loss would be too great.

However, he wanted to go, but Gu Hai Ancestor wouldn't let him go.

"Weeping Blood Emperor, since you're here, don't go, you once killed our Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate, and you are ranked ninth on the wanted list of the Battle Gate!"

The Ancient Sea Ancestor made a move in an instant.

I saw that the Ancient Sea Ancestor was holding a top-level saint-level stick, and nine holy relics were integrated into it, which showed the strength of this top-level saint soldier.

Rumble!!!!

The top-level holy weapon stick slammed into the Weeping Blood Emperor, and the entire Xuanxu Saint Realm trembled slightly, which was enough to see how terrifying the power of this stick was.

"Not good!"

The Weeping Blood Emperor was shocked, and used all his strength to use a defensive holy technique to try to resist the Ancient Sea Ancestor.

And yet—

Click!

The defensive holy technique was shattered, and the defensive holy soldiers on his body were also shattered.

Bang!

The body of the Weeping Blood Emperor was torn apart, and although it healed again, the Ancient Sea Ancestor continued to make a move.

Countless stick shadows shrouded the Weeping Blood Emperor, and they exploded the Weeping Blood Emperor again and again.

Soon.

This doppelganger of the Weeping Blood Emperor was truly and completely destroyed, and it could no longer be healed, and even the soul of that clone was annihilated.

Before this doppelganger died, the Weeping Blood Emperor said angrily: "Ancient Sea Ancestor, one day, I will kill you!"

"Always welcome!"

Gu Hai Ancestor said with a smile.

......

The Ancient Sea Ancestor killed this clone of the Weeping Blood Emperor, and many Domain Ancestors breathed a sigh of relief.

At the very least, the Ancient Sea Ancestor was the invincible Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate, and he was one of the thirty-six War Emperors of the Battle Gate, so it was impossible to make a move against them.

At this time.

Ye Tian was still attacking the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor, and he had no intention of stopping.

The Ancient Sea Ancestor did not interfere, and it was not necessary to interfere with his strength, and Ye Tian had the strength to kill these two invincible domain ancestors.

"It's over, it's completely over, even if the Holy Lord comes here, he won't be able to save us, unless the Supreme Elder makes a move!"

The Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor said in despair.

However, will the Supreme Elder make a move?

No way!

Elder Taishang has not recovered from his injuries now, how dare he leave the Qingyuan Saint Realm, once he leaves, if he is attacked by a hostile Peerless Domain Ancestor, he may be at risk of falling.

And staying in the Qingyuan Holy Realm, the other higher-level domain ancestors would not dare to enter the Qingyuan Holy Land, otherwise it would be a provocation to the Holy Land Alliance!

As one of the holy places, the Qingyuan Holy Land is naturally protected.

Therefore, it was impossible for the Supreme Elder to come to their rescue.

"Even if I die, I will take you with me!"

Mi Li Domain Ancestor and Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestors said angrily.

Immediately, the two of them performed forbidden techniques, and their strength soared one by one.

However, no matter how desperately they tried, they still couldn't hurt Ye Tian.

As they cast the forbidden technique, the time they held on was much shorter, and as the effect of the forbidden technique passed, they were extremely weak, and they couldn't resist Ye Tian's attack at all, and their injuries completely broke out.

Not long after, the Mili Domain Ancestor was killed by Ye Tian.

After that, the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Lives Domain also fell completely.

The two Invincible Domain Ancestors fell here, giving many onlookers a deep shock.

At this time, the eyes of many Supreme Domain Ancestors looking at Ye Tian were full of awe.

After Ye Tian killed the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Wansheng Domain Ancestor, he put away their treasures, and even the Qingyuan Realm Bead fell into Ye Tian's hands.

However, he didn't have time to inspect these treasures, but flew in front of the Ancient Sea Ancestor.

"Thank you Gu Hai Ancestor for your help!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

If it weren't for the Ancient Sea Ancestor's action, he might be fine this time, but the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Wansheng Domain Ancestor would definitely escape, and the Terran's saint-level vein would naturally be gone.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, let's find a place to talk!"

Ancient Sea Ancestral Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tian invited the Ancient Sea Ancestor to come to the human realm of the human race and personally entertained the Ancient Sea Ancestor.

The human world.

"Ancient Sea Ancestor, you should have come out of the Battle Realm Tower, right?"

Ye Tian said.

"Oh, I thought I was hiding deep enough, but I didn't expect you to sense it during the battle, it seems that your control over the Xuanxu Holy Realm is very high!"

Gu Hai Ancestor was surprised.

"Ancient Sea Ancestor, you should have entered from the Battle Boundary Tower of the Dark Sacred Domain, why was you able to come out of the Battle Boundary Tower of our Xuanxu Ancient Realm, this is incredible. If the Battle Realm Tower could travel at will, wouldn't it be comparable to the Gate of Time and Space in the Dark Destruction Domain?" Ye Tian said curiously.

"Hahaha, Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you think too much, the Battle Realm Tower is naturally far from being comparable to the Gate of Time and Space. In fact, the War Tower allows a Domain Ancestor to travel to another War Tower, but there is no way to get too far from the War Tower. For example, I can only stay in the Xuanxu Saint Realm at most now, and if I leave too far, the Battle Realm Tower will swallow me back. In fact, if I stay a little longer, the consumption of the War Boundary Tower will be great. You can understand that I am still inside the War Tower, but the War Tower has made me manifest in the outside world in a special way. Of course, only the Invincible Domain Ancestor can do this, the Supreme Domain Ancestor cannot, otherwise he will not be able to withstand the power of the Battle Realm Tower, and his body will instantly turn into powder! Therefore, the limitations of the Battle Realm Tower are too great, far from being able to compare with the Gate of Time and Space!"

Gu Hai Ancestor explained.

"I see!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, you be careful, this time you killed those two Invincible Domain Ancestors, I don't know which force is behind them, if it is from the Holy Gate, maybe they will continue to retaliate against you. If you really encounter a desperate situation, ask for help from the Battle Gate as soon as possible, understand?" the Ancient Sea Ancestor reminded.

"Thank you Gu Hai Ancestor, I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

In fact, he knew that those two Invincible Domain Ancestors were from the Qingyuan Holy Land, but he didn't say it.

Even if it is said, it is the Qingyuan Holy Land that has suffered serious losses this time, and the Battle Gate will not destroy the Qingyuan Holy Land, at most it will be suppressed.

Therefore, when he is strong, he will go to the trouble of Qingyuan Holy Land by himself!
